title: Error in foreach statement with skipped index
body:
In regressions of cases from the SystemVerilog LRM, legal case on 1800-2012 page 282 (or 1800-2023 page 332) errors out:

%Error: syntax error, unexpected ',', expecting IDENTIFIER or IDENTIFIER-for-pathpulse or randomize

**Code:**
```
bit [3:0][2:1] B [5:1][4];
initial foreach( B [ q, r, , s ] ) begin end  // iteration over the third index is skipped 
```

**Version:**
5.044

**Environment:**
Centos 7.9，GCC 11.5
code_blocks:
bit [3:0][2:1] B [5:1][4];
initial foreach( B [ q, r, , s ] ) begin end  // iteration over the third index is skipped
